name: cloudml_upload
description: Upload .plf engine file to CloudML model repo. Prepares upload package (model.plf + metadata.json) then submits to CloudML.

name: mi_pyvista_vis_multi
description: 3D point cloud visualization with PyVista. Renders point clouds with OD/FS annotations overlaid. Interactive desktop viewer.

name: mi_pyvista_vis_multi_browser
description: Browser-based 3D point cloud visualization. Serves visualization over WebSocket for remote viewing.
input_desc: Config: mi_pyvista_vis_multi_browser.yaml (pkl_file, eval_dir, host, port, fps)

name: mi_pyvista_vis_multi_pl
description: 3D point cloud visualization (pipeline variant). Renders val results with segmentation overlays.

name: trt_build_local_large
description: Build TRT engine (.plf) for Large model on local docker (3090 GPU). Starts flatformer docker, clones lidar-dl feat_merge branch, runs ONNX conversion + trtexec.

name: trt_build_local_lite
description: Build TRT engine (.plf) for Lite model (S1) on local docker (3090 GPU). Starts flatformer docker, clones lidar-dl dev_lit branch, runs ONNX conversion + trtexec.
input_desc: Model checkpoint path, build params (batch size, precision)

name: trt_build_remote_large_L4
description: Build TRT engine (.plf) for Large model on remote Volc L4 GPU. Submits Volc task with L4 queue, clones lidar-dl feat_merge, runs L4-specific ONNX script + trtexec.
input_desc: Model checkpoint path, Volc task params. Template: scripts/volc_trt_l4_template.yaml
output_desc: .plf engine file (SCP to local, then upload to CloudML)

name: trt_build_remote_lite_L4
description: Build TRT engine (.plf) for Lite model (S1) on remote Volc L4 GPU. Submits Volc task with L4 queue, clones lidar-dl dev_lit, runs L4-specific ONNX script + trtexec.
input_desc: Model checkpoint path, Volc task params. Template: scripts/volc_trt_l4_template.yaml
output_desc: .plf engine file (SCP to local, then upload to CloudML)

name: add_flow_to_existing_frame_pkls
description: Add scene flow data to existing frame pkl files. Augments frames with flow vectors for motion estimation training.
output_desc: Frame pkls augmented with flow data

name: calculate_mapped_labels
description: Count labels after applying pt_seg_map_dict label remapping. Validates label distribution after mapping changes.

name: extract_frames_by_label
description: Extract or filter frames from pkl by label condition. Supports balanced selection with target_count.

name: filter_ignore_pts_manually
description: Manually filter ignore-labeled points from pkl using edit rectangles JSON. For cleaning up annotation noise.
output_desc: Cleaned pkl with ignore points removed

name: find_bad_cp_samples
description: Find samples with suspicious Construction Pillar annotations. Compares model predictions against GT to identify annotation errors.

name: find_frames_in_dataclips
description: Find which frames appear in which dataclip pkl files. Cross-references multiple pkls to track frame provenance.

name: find_local_deppdata_fs_diff
description: Diff local FS annotations against deep-data platform versions. Detects annotation drift between dataset releases.

name: find_unused_folders
description: Find data folders not referenced by any pkl file. Helps clean up unused data on remote storage.

name: generate_training_pkl
description: Merge multiple data pkl files into a final training pkl with configurable sampling ratios. Core data pipeline tool for assembling training datasets.
input_desc: Config: generate_training_pkl.yaml (train_data_list with paths and sampling ratios)

name: raw_L3_FS_anno_to_pkl
description: Convert raw L3 Free Space annotations to training pkl format. Processes FS segmentation labels from dataset versions.
output_desc: Training pkl files with FS segmentation labels

name: raw_L3_OD_anno_to_pkl
description: Convert raw L3 Object Detection annotations (JSON) to training pkl format. Parses annotation JSONs from dataset versions, extracts 3D bboxes, and outputs pickle files.
output_desc: Training pkl files with OD annotations

name: raw_anno_split_train_and_val_bin
description: Split raw annotation binary files into train and validation sets. Processes data folders with multi-threading.

name: raw_e2e_anno_to_pkl
description: Convert raw E2E (end-to-end) annotations to pkl format. Handles E2E FS barrier diagonal dataset conversion.

name: reproduce_ann_res
description: Reproduce annotation results for validation. Re-runs annotation pipeline to verify consistency.

name: split_underdog_data_pkl
description: Split underdog (hard example) data into separate pkl files. Used for hard example mining and targeted retraining.
input_desc: Source pkl path (referenced in script via config/)
output_desc: Split pkl files for hard examples
